A

actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.ChangePasswordAdminWindow
Handles the action events triggered by the dialog's buttons.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.FormAdminWindow
Handles the action events for the OK and Cancel buttons.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.FormBookWindow
Handles action events from the OK and Cancel buttons.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.FormClientWindow
Responds to action events from the interface components (buttons).
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.FormCruiseWindow
Handles action events from the action buttons (OK or Cancel).
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.FormWorkerWindow
Handles interactions with the interface buttons to either clear the form or confirm the worker insertion/modification.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.ListAdminWindow
Handles action events from the Add, Delete, and Modify buttons.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.ListBookWindow
Handles actions originating from the interface buttons.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.ListClientWindow
Responds to the clicking of buttons within the dialog.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.ListCruiseWindow
Process events originated from interface interactions.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.ListWorkerWindow
Detects and responds to the interaction with the specific interface option selected.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.LoginWindow
Responds to the interactions generated over the login button.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.MainWindow
Orchestrates interaction processing against the navigation action buttons.
Administrator - Class in model
Represents an administrator entity in the system handling login and credentials.
Administrator() - Constructor for class model.Administrator
Default constructor that initializes the administrator's information to null.
Administrator(String, String) - Constructor for class model.Administrator
Constructor that initializes the administrator's information with the provided name and password.
AdministratorDAO - Interface in model
Data Access Object interface for managing Administrator entities.
ARABIC - Enum constant in enum class model.Language
